styleLock: flat 2D cartoon, thick black outlines 3px, saturated pastel palette (mint, lemon, coral, periwinkle, soft brown), top-down 3/4 perspective, lit from top-left at 45 degrees, soft dusty shadow directly below, no background (transparent PNG), 128x128 pixel-clean render suitable for a cozy mobile strategy game, cohesive illustrator-like finish.

factions.Bees: lemon yellow with black stripes, gauzy wings
factions.Spiders: deep purple with neon green eyes

units.WorkerAnt: a cheerful worker ant, six legs, carrying a tiny leaf over its head, tiny backpack
units.SoldierAnt: a sturdy soldier ant, oversized mandibles, wearing a paper crown, confident stance
units.DirtDigger: a burly ant with comically oversized front claws for digging, goggles, stubborn expression
units.Forager: a fuzzy bee with a tiny satchel of nectar, cute wings
units.Wasp: a sleek wasp with a stinger, bandit mask over eyes, determined glare
units.HoneyTank: a round, armored bee draped in honeycomb plates, slow and imposing
units.ShieldBeetle: a tank-like beetle with a riveted metal shield carapace, small legs
units.BombBeetle: a cute beetle carrying a dandelion-puff bomb above its head, wide eyes
units.Roller: a muscular beetle rolling a dew droplet like a wrecking ball
units.Jumper: a jumping spider, fuzzy legs, cat-like alert pose
units.WebSetter: a spinner spider weaving a glowing silver web between tiny twigs
units.Ambusher: a camouflaged spider peeking from under a leaf, only eyes visible

buildings.QueenChamber: a majestic glowing queen chamber on layered dirt mound, lit from within, throne-like silhouette
buildings.DewCollector: a shimmering dew drop suspended in a twig cradle, rain-catcher
buildings.MushroomTurret: a red-capped mushroom turret with a small cannon in the stem, white dots
buildings.LeafWall: a tall overlapping leaf wall woven with spider silk, organic ridge
buildings.PebbleBunker: a fortress of stacked river pebbles, moss in the cracks
buildings.LarvaNursery: a cozy domed nursery with glowing larva pods visible through oval windows
buildings.SugarVault: a wooden vault door with a giant sugar-cube lock, sprinkles around it
buildings.TunnelJunction: a clean carved earth tunnel entrance, multiple paths radiating out
buildings.DungeonTrap: a disguised pitfall covered with twigs and leaves, ominous shadow inside
